ep_nudge_011.content: Authentication uses JWT tokens with RS256 algorithm. The validateToken function must check expiry before accessing claims. Test coverage for auth middleware was missing.

ep_plan_006.content: Task: 419-260405-054539 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 419-260405-054539 completed a JWT auth redesign with RBAC migration in rerun mode with all 7 stages completing 0 retries each, but verify stage reported FAIL due to test errors (1 failed test file, 117 passed) while review stage verdicts PASS and pipeline proceeds to ship anyway. This is the seventh consecutive run exhibiting the identical flaw where verify stage failures fail to halt pipeline progression. | Pattern: This is the seventh consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844, 419-rerun) exhibiting the identical pattern: verify stage reports FAIL due to test failures or PagesPageConfig type constraint violations, yet the pipeline proceeds through review-fix and ship without blocking. Five prior retrospectives across two days recommended adding a conditional gate in ship to check verify exit status, but the flaw persists unchanged. The autofix stage cannot resolve this class of errors, and the pipeline lacks a mechanism to halt when verify reports FAIL. | Suggestion: Implement the conditional gate in the ship stage that was recommended in five prior retrospectives without implementation: add a verifyExitCode check in the ship stage template that reads the verify stage's exit status and halts with an error when verify reports FAIL, preventing automatic shipment of code that failed validation. | Flaw: verify → ship gate — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed

ep_review_004.content: Review found that imports use .js extensions consistently. Barrel exports via index.ts are used throughout. No timezone issues detected. Coverage improved to 74%.

ep_nudge_012.content: JWT validation in auth middleware is tricky — need to verify both signature and expiry separately. User prefers terse error messages. CI failed twice on missing environment variables.

ep_plan_001.content: Task: 260409-111824 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 260409-111824 successfully created an isOdd utility function in src/utils/math.ts with all 7 pipeline stages completing in 212 seconds and zero retries across all stages. However, the verify stage reported FAIL with typecheck errors in .next/dev/types/validator.ts (TS2344 type constraint failures on modal and ErrorPage.test imports), yet the ship stage proceeded to completion without blocking. This run exhibits the same verify-then-ship pattern failure documented in retrospectives for runs 832 and 841, where verification failures do not prevent pipeline progression to the ship stage. | Pattern: This is the third consecutive instance of the identical pattern (runs 832, 841, and now 260409-111824) where verify-stage typecheck failures fail to block deployment. The previous two retrospectives both recommended adding a conditional gate in ship to check verify exit status, but the flaw persists unchanged, indicating the recommendation was not implemented. | Suggestion: Implement the conditional gate in the ship stage that was recommended in the two prior retrospectives: check verify stage exit status and halt with a clear error message when verify reports FAIL, rather than proceeding silently to ship. | Flaw: verify — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed

ep_plan_002.content: Task: 840-260409-110822 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 840-260409-110822 completed a chore to verify the memory nudge feature end-to-end, with all 7 pipeline stages completing in 1018s. The verify stage reported FAIL due to typecheck errors in .next/dev/types/validator.ts involving PagesPageConfig constraints for modal and ErrorPage imports. The review and review-fix stages completed successfully (0 retries each), but the verify stage still failed. The pipeline proceeded to ship, updating PR #843, demonstrating the fourth consecutive instance of the identical pattern where verify-stage typecheck failures do not prevent deployment. | Pattern: This is the fourth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, and now 840) exhibiting the same pattern: verify stage reports FAIL due to typecheck errors, yet the pipeline continues to review-fix and ship without blocking. The autofix stage completes successfully but cannot fix PagesPageConfig type constraint violations that appear to be structural page configuration mismatches. Despite repeated retrospectives recommending a conditional gate in ship to check verify exit status, the flaw persists unchanged. | Suggestion: Investigate whether autofix has the capability to resolve PagesPageConfig type constraint violations in .next/dev/types/validator.ts, or if these require manual intervention. If autofix cannot address this class of errors, configure the pipeline to block ship stage when verify reports FAIL for typecheck errors specifically. | Flaw: verify — Verify stage typecheck failures do not halt pipeline progression to ship, and autofix cannot resolve PagesPageConfig type constraint violations | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed

ep_plan_003.content: Task: 842-260409-112718 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 842-260409-112718 completed a chore to verify existing MCP server integration implementation, with all 7 pipeline stages completing successfully including verify which required 1 retry. However, the verify.md artifact shows verification FAIL due to persistent PagesPageConfig type constraint errors in .next/dev/types/validator.ts (lines 350, 386, 395) that appear to be structural page configuration mismatches. The pipeline nonetheless proceeded to ship stage and updated PR #843, continuing the established pattern where typecheck failures do not block deployment. | Pattern: This is the fifth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, and now 842) exhibiting the identical pattern: verify stage reports FAIL due to PagesPageConfig type constraint violations in .next/dev/types/validator.ts, yet the pipeline proceeds through review-fix and ship without blocking. Four prior retrospectives recommended adding a conditional gate in ship to check verify exit status, but the flaw persists unchanged. The autofix stage cannot resolve this class of structural type errors, and the pipeline lacks a mechanism to halt when verify reports FAIL. | Suggestion: Since four consecutive retrospectives have recommended implementing a conditional gate in ship to check verify exit status without implementation, escalate this to a configuration change rather than another recommendation: add a verifyExitCode check in the ship stage template that reads the verify stage's exit status and halts with an error when verify reports FAIL, preventing automatic shipment of code that failed typecheck validation. | Flaw: verify — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed

ep_plan_004.content: Task: 844-260409-113639 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 844-260409-113639 completed all 7 pipeline stages with 0 retries each, shipping PR #843 despite verify stage reporting FAIL due to typecheck errors in .next/dev/types/validator.ts involving PagesPageConfig type constraints. This is the sixth consecutive run exhibiting the identical pattern where verify-stage failures do not block deployment. The pipeline continues to function mechanically correctly (all stages complete, autofix runs, review-fix runs, ship executes) but lacks a critical gate that would halt progression when verification fails. No new insights were generated this run — the pattern is fully established and the recommendation from five prior retrospectives has not been implemented. | Pattern: This is the sixth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844) exhibiting the identical flaw: verify stage reports FAIL due to PagesPageConfig type constraint violations in .next/dev/types/validator.ts, yet the pipeline proceeds through review-fix and ship without blocking. Five prior retrospectives across three different days all recommended adding a conditional gate in ship to check verify exit status, but the flaw persists unchanged. The autofix stage cannot resolve this class of structural type errors, and the pipeline lacks a mechanism to halt when verify reports FAIL. | Suggestion: Implement the conditional gate in the ship stage that was recommended in five prior retrospectives without implementation: add a verifyExitCode check in the ship stage template that reads the verify stage's exit status and halts with an error when verify reports FAIL, preventing automatic shipment of code that failed typecheck validation. | Flaw: verify — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
